creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
they are there, you just either a) have "NOPORTDOCS" defined in your
/etc/make.conf or b) have too old of a version of postfix-current before I
started installing those files.

> locate FILTER_README
/usr/local/share/doc/postfix/FILTER_README

I'd suggest cvsupping your ports tree or adding the new package and see if
it makes a difference, if not you have NOPORTDOCS defined somewhere.
